title: 6 PaymentStream AFT User Management
body_text:
6	PaymentStream AFT User Management
6.1	Overview of PaymentStream AFT User Management
Access to
PaymentStreamГўВ„Вў
AFT is granted in User Management. An individual must be set up as a CPS Admin Security Officer or a Client Centre User and be assigned access to
PaymentStream
AFT. See the User Management Part for procedures on creating users, providing access to
PaymentStream
AFT, and defining AFT permissions.
6.2	Assigning PaymentStream AFT Permissions in User Management
Once access to
PaymentStream
AFT is granted, a user is given access to specific Originator IDs. Permissions and approval requirements for the Originator ID are based on the user, as follows:
Read Only
ГўВҖВ“ Default user permission that allows a user to view records, reports, and Originator information. All
PaymentStream
AFT users have read-only permissions before any additional permissions can be assigned.
Perform Tasks and Transactions
ГўВҖВ“ Allows a user to add and edit records, release transactions, or upload files.
Approve for this Originator ID
ГўВҖВ“ Allows a user to approve tasks and transactions initiated by users who require approval.
Edit Originator ID
ГўВҖВ“ For financial institution users only. Allows a user to edit an Originator ID in
PaymentStream
AFT for limits, contact information, and additional emails.
Requires Approval
ГўВҖВ“ Determines if a user requires an approval when performing tasks and transactions.
For more information on managing permissions for
PaymentStream
AFT, see the User Management Part.
6.3	Managing Business Member Users
CPS Admin Security Officers (Administrators) at your financial institution are responsible for managing your business member users via User Management. See the User Management Part for procedures.
For this process, you can use the
PaymentStream
AFT User Request ГўВҖВ“ Business Members, Form 6257. The form is designed as a template for your internal use only. See Figure 1.
Completion of this (optional) form is self-explanatory, but note the following:
ГўВ‘
Business Name
ГўВҖВ“ Enter the name of your business member.
ГўВ‘ВЎ
Phone number
ГўВҖВ“ Enter your business memberГўВҖВҷs phone number.
ГўВ‘Вў
UserГўВҖВҷs Name
ГўВҖВ“ Enter the name of your business memberГўВҖВҷs user.
ГўВ‘ВЈ
Originator ID
ГўВҖВ“ Enter your business memberГўВҖВҷs OID (e.g., 8090000100); do this for each OID the user has access to.
ГўВ‘ВӨ
Permissions
ГўВҖВ“ Indicate permissions the user has for the OID (you can select one, two, or all three options); do this for each OID the user has access to).
Figure 1: PaymentStream AFT User Request ГўВҖВ“ Business Members, Form 6257
Related Information
PaymentStream
AFT User Request ГўВҖВ“ Business Members,
Form 6257
END
